div.head: The Greek Minister (Simopoulos) to the Secretary of State
div.p: The Minister of Greece presents his compliments to His Excellency The Secretary of State and has the honor to acknowledge the receipt of the Department’s Note No. 711.689/3, dated March 22, 1928, concerning the conclusion of a convention pertaining to alcoholic beverages on board ships flying the Greek flag.

The Minister of Greece is pleased to inform His Excellency The Secretary of State that the draft of the convention, so kindly forwarded to this Legation, has been given due consideration, and that he has been duly authorized to sign it.
The Minister of Greece has the honor to forward to His Excellency The Secretary of State the instrument by which full power is given to himNot printed. to sign this convention.
